tasks.name: Verify login redirect to /home for personal accounts
tasks.purpose: Ensure authenticated users land on /home after login as expected

constraints: Redirect should go to /home for personal accounts

tasks.input_state: Login redirect code exists at apps/web/app/auth/callback/route.ts with redirectPath: pathsConfig.app.home
tasks.output_state: Login redirect verified to work correctly, sending users to /home after authentication
tasks.acceptance_criterion: User login redirects to /home for personal accounts (excluding onboarding/team join cases)

tasks.name: Verify Home navigation item shows active state on dashboard
tasks.purpose: Ensure Home navigation item is highlighted when user is on /home route

constraints: Home route has end: true flag for exact matching
isRouteActive utility handles active state detection
Active state shows border and different text color

tasks.input_state: Navigation config defines Home route with path /home and end: true. BorderedNavigationMenuItem uses isRouteActive to detect active state.
tasks.output_state: Home navigation item verified to show active state (border + color change) when on /home route
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Home navigation item shows active visual state when pathname is /home (exact match due to end: true)
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'path: pathsConfig.app.home' apps/web/config/personal-account-navigation.config.tsx && grep -q 'end: true' apps/web/config/personal-account-navigation.config.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create E2E smoke test for dashboard navigation
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard loads and navigation works in end-to-end test environment

constraints: Check for Home navigation active state

tasks.input_state: Existing smoke tests at apps/e2e/tests/smoke/smoke.spec.ts provide pattern. Auth tests show login pattern with AuthPageObject.
tasks.output_state: New smoke test added that logs in and verifies /home page loads with correct navigation state
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Smoke test passes: user logs in, lands on /home, Home nav item is visible and active
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'dashboard loads after login' apps/e2e/tests/smoke/smoke.spec.ts && pnpm --filter e2e test apps/e2e/tests/smoke/smoke.spec.ts

groups.name: Verification & Testing
groups.notes: All tasks are verification/testing, can run sequentially but are fast

duration.notes: Verification tasks are fast and sequential by nature

validation.notes: All tasks are atomic verification tasks. No implementation needed - just confirming existing behavior works.
